[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010001 3
1 00100010 2
2 11111111 a
3 11010011 5
4 01010011 4
5 11010100 4
6 10100110 4
7 01000111 4

01 10 00010010 2
12 21 01010001 3 match 0
23 32 00000000 a
34 43 00000100 1
45 54 10000100 2
56 65 00000110 2
67 76 01000101 3
70 07 00010100 2

13 31 00000010 1
24 42 11010000 3
35 53 00000110 2

57 75 00000100 1

71 17 01010001 3 match 0

03 30 00000110 2
14 41 01010000 2
25 52 10000000 1
36 63 00000110 2
47 74 01010100 3
50 05 10100110 4 match 6
61 16 01000011 3
72 27 01010001 3 match 0

15 51 00000010 1

37 73 00000100 1
